entry.title: New IDC FA852814D0015 awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN CORPORATION for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: AFLCMC/WIKBA and AFLCMC/WISC are the only organizations authorized to utilized this contract vehicle.

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: SUPPORT AND SUSTAINMENT AND PROGRAMMED DEPOT MAINTENANCE.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER AIRCRAFT PARTS AND AUXILIARY EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
